ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the document:  This document confirms Krishana Phoschem Limited's compliance with SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. Their Registrar and Share Transfer Agent certified that all dematerialization requests, had there been any, would have been processed correctly and timely; critically, **no dematerialization requests were actually received** during the reporting period. This indicates adherence to regulatory protocols with no material impact on the company's shareholding structure or liquidity from demat activity this quarter, as there was none.
